name: Puebla
author: rslurry
description: Combined result of INEGI's DENUE, CE, CPV, and ENOE data. Covers from Tecamachalco in the southeast to Nanacamilpa in the northwest. Includes demand for PBC airport; BUAP, UDLAP, UPAEP, and Ibero universities; and Capilla del Rosario, Catedral de Puebla, Zona Arqueológica de Cholula, Africam Safari, Estadio Cuauhtémoc, and Estadio Hermanos Serdán.
data_source: INEGI's DENUE, CE, CPV, and ENOE
